name: com.coachfit.activity.adapter.in.ActivityController
comment:
REST controller for activity read / update / delete endpoints. 
 GET    /api/v1/activities                   — paginated, filterable list GET    /api/v1/activities/{id}              — full detail GET    /api/v1/activities/{id}/streams      — time-series data GET    /api/v1/activities/{id}/laps         — lap summaries PUT    /api/v1/activities/{id}              — update name / description / gear DELETE /api/v1/activities/{id}              — soft delete GET    /api/v1/activities/{id}/download     — pre-signed download URL

Authentication is enforced by the JWT filter chain configured in {@code SecurityConfig}. Every use case receives the authenticated user's UUID from {@link UserPrincipal}, ensuring strict ownership isolation.

File upload ({@code POST /activities/upload}) is handled by {@link ActivityUploadController}.

methods.name: list
methods.signature: list(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.time.LocalDate, java.time.LocalDate, int, int, java.lang.String, com.coachfit.shared.adapter.in.security.jwt.UserPrincipal)
methods.comment:
Lists the authenticated user's activities.

Query parameters (all optional):

  • {@code sport} — filter by sport (e.g. "cycling", "running")
  • {@code source} — filter by source (e.g. "strava", "garmin", "manual")
  • {@code from} — ISO date lower bound (inclusive) e.g. "2025-01-01"
  • {@code to} — ISO date upper bound (inclusive)
  • {@code page} — 0-indexed page (default 0)
  • {@code size} — page size (default 20, max 100)
  • {@code sort} — field,direction e.g. "startedAt,desc" (default)

methods.name: get
methods.comment: Returns the full detail of a single activity.

methods.name: getStreams
methods.comment: Returns the time-series stream data for an activity. Returns 404 if the activity has no recorded streams.

methods.name: getLaps
methods.comment: Returns the ordered list of laps for an activity. Returns an empty list if no laps were recorded.

methods.name: update
methods.comment: Updates editable fields of an activity (name, description, gearId). Null fields in the request body leave the persisted value unchanged. Returns 200 with the updated activity detail.

methods.name: delete
methods.comment: Soft-deletes an activity (sets {@code deleted_at = now()}). Returns 204 No Content on success.

methods.name: download
methods.comment: Returns a short-lived pre-signed URL for downloading the original activity file. Returns 404 if the activity was not created from a file upload.

methods.name: parseSortParam
methods.comment:
Parses the {@code sort} query parameter in the format {@code field[,direction]}.

Examples: {@code "startedAt,desc"}, {@code "tss"} (direction defaults to "desc").

name: com.coachfit.activity.adapter.in.dto.ActivityLapsResponse
comment: HTTP response body for {@code GET /api/v1/activities/{id}/laps} (200 OK).
